zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes是Edmund Alcock的女兒，於1412年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利。她和Simon Poley至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1492年在她的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes是Edmund Alcock的女儿，于1412年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利。她和Simon Poley至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1492年在她的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes was born in 1412, in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Edmund Alcock. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Simon Poley. She died in 1492, in her hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes est née en 1412, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille d’Edmund Alcock. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Simon Poley. Elle est décédée en 1492, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes wurde 1412 in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Edmund Alcock geboren. Sie hatte mit Simon Poley mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1492 im Alter von 80 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes è nata il nel 1412 nel Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Edmund Alcock. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Simon Poley. Morì nel 1492, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokesは1412年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーでEdmund Alcockの娘として生まれた。彼女はSimon Poleyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1492年に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes(은)는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에서 Edmund Alcock의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Simon Poley(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 그녀의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes nasceu em 1412, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Edmund Alcock. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Simon Poley. Ela faleceu em 1492, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes родилась в 1412 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Edmund Alcock. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Simon Poley. Она умерла в 1492 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Alcokes nació en 1412, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Edmund Alcock. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Simon Poley. Murió en 1492, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
